Report.title: Diagnostic Report
Report.description: A diagnostic report generated from Kavach logs.

date.description: The timestamp when the report was generated.

avgLag.description: Average MA refresh lag in seconds.

badStations.description: List of stations with poor performance.

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated the report.

notes.description: Optional notes added by the user.

isFlagged.description: Whether the report is flagged for attention.

fullData.description: Stringified JSON of the full analysis data for recall.

originalFiles.description: List of original log files uploaded to Firebase Storage.

StationHistory.title: Station History
StationHistory.description: Historical performance data for a specific station.

locoId.description: The ID of the locomotive involved.

/station_history/{historyId}.description: Collection of historical station performance data.
